manufacturer: Mohawk Lifts (Mohawk Resources Ltd.), 65 Vrooman Ave., Amsterdam NY 12010
weight: Minimum shipping weight 15,000 lbs (6.8 metric tons)

installation_requirements.base_plates: 4 base plates, 5 bolts per plate (20 bolts total max, operates safely with min 4 bolts)
installation_requirements.levelling_bolts: Minimum 2 vertically mounted levelling bolts per side of each base plate
installation_requirements.installer_qualifications: Factory authorized and trained personnel required for warranty validation

specifications.asymmetric_loading: Up to 85% of max capacity on front or rear hinge, balance anywhere along runway
specifications.synchronization: Electronic sensor-free volumetric mechanical-hydraulic cylinder divider control system
specifications.cylinders: Minimum 4 hydraulic fluid driven cylinders, 1 inversely mounted to each of 4 upper hinge legs
specifications.cylinder_type: Piston type with chromium plated plunger shafts
specifications.hydraulic_flow_control_valves: No less than 5, operating pressure approximately 220 Bar
specifications.lifting_leg_material: 50 mm (2 inch) XAR 400 thick steel bar minimum (no welds or tube design)
specifications.runway_design: Box design minimum 250 mm thick (not plate welded to I beams)
specifications.grease_fittings: Zirk style at all accessible hinge points
specifications.pivot_design: Floor mounted fixed pads (no sliding), AOS or equivalent shock absorbing system at each hinge
specifications.floor_access: Totally open floor design, no obstructions between platforms, no crossbeams front or rear
specifications.drive_system: Electrically powered pump, flow control valves, fluid reservoir (no electronic synchronization devices)

features: True pantograph K-style design (not Y design) for maximum under-runway free access
Vertical rise with no throw in any direction
Open floor design with no obstructions or crossbeams between platforms
Asymmetric loading rated (85% on one end)
LED 24V explosion proof lighting system on inner runway edge (6, 8, or 10 fixture sets)
Zirk style grease fittings at all accessible hinge points
Box design runways minimum 250 mm thick
50 mm XAR 400 steel lifting legs (no welds or tube design)
AOS shock absorbing system at each hinge
Cylinders remain covered by runway at all times
No chains, cables, slack cables, or pulleys
Troubleshooting codes for diagnostics and service
Available for longitudinal and transversal loading
optional_equipment: Runway extensions 66 inches (1700 mm) for up to 48 ft modular length for articulated vehicles
Pneumatic style lifting platform for recessed in-floor installations (operates sequentially with lift controls)
Second set of drive-on ramps for drive-through applications
Longer approach ramps or double inclination style ramps for lower vehicles
Silicone traction surface built into powder coat or clear coat (diamond plate not acceptable)
Hot dip galvanized Nickel Zinc coating (130 microns / 5 Mils minimum) for wash bay environments
Stainless steel baseplates (in lieu of galvanized)
Automatic foot-guard protection (cantilevering bar with 24V micro switches, not pressure tape)
Manual hydraulic hand pump for power failure lowering
Greasing manifold for central lubrication of all zirk fittings
Water resistant control system for wash bay environments
Explosion proof component upgrades for paint booth applications
Jacking beam options: 26,400 lb (12,000 kg), 36,000 lb (16,000 kg), or 44,000 lb (20,000 kg) - double-piston telescopic, ALI/ETL certified
certifications: ETL Certified to ANSI/ALI Standard ALCTV-2017: Safety Requirements for Construction, Testing and Validation
ALI (Automotive Lift Institute) membership required and in good standing
Jacking beams certified to ANSI/ALI ALCTV 2017 Standards
safety_features: Independent fail-safe mechanical safety device on each lifting hinge (locking catch engages teeth on locking strip)
Pneumatically operated lock release (8-19 Bar) - lift must rise off locks before descent
Locking mechanism activates within 3 inches (76 mm) of lifting height
Mechanical locking system using minimum 250 mm XAR 400 plate steel
Dead man operated safety lock releases
Limiting switch with audible alarm (buzzer) stopping lowering at 500 mm / 19 inches
Photo electric shutoff switch mounted inside rear of runways
Hydraulic burst valves (velocity fuses) at base of all lifting cylinders
Minimum 5 hydraulic flow control valves at approximately 220 Bar operating pressure
Dual levelling systems per lifting device
Automatic foot-guard protection (optional) with 24V micro switches
submittals_required: Manufacturer's data sheets (preparation instructions, storage/handling, installation methods)
Shop drawings showing full layout with dimensions, services, and conduits
Operation and Maintenance Manual (system operation, maintenance, troubleshooting, spare parts, drawings, schematics)

wash_bay_specifications.galvanized_coating: Hot dip galvanized Nickel Zinc protective coating
wash_bay_specifications.surface_preparation: Steel pellet blast (Wheelabrator style) with acid wash before coating
components_galvanized: Legs (completely galvanized and re-machined for pins and hinged elements)
wash_bay_specifications.control_system: Hydraulic/mechanical volumetric (no electrical synchronizing devices - no inclinometers or rotary encoders)

notes: Substitutions: Not permitted per bid specification language
Any substitution requiring foundation modifications is the contractor's responsibility
Mobile column type lifts, four post lifts, and parallelogram lifts (which throw) are not acceptable
Y design lifts are not acceptable
Legs using multiple welds or tube design are not acceptable
Diamond plate runway surface is not acceptable
Pressure sensitive tape switch style shutoff systems are not acceptable
Lifts with collapsed height exceeding 360 mm / 14.2 inches are not acceptable
Lifts with less than 79 inches (2022 mm) lifting height are not acceptable
Lifts weighing less than 15,000 lbs shipping weight deemed too lightweight structurally
Maintain environmental conditions within manufacturer limits during installation
Store products in manufacturer's unopened packaging until ready for installation
